name: std-multi-party-flow
description: std-multi-party-flow — Escrow.com / DocuSign / Stripe Connect style multi-party transaction. Header + summary (subject/amount/reference) + named parties (avatar/role/actor) + stage progress + your-turn panel + activity feed + dispute/cancel escape hatches. Topology = loading / awaiting / capturing_dispute / capturing_cancel / funded / released / disputed / cancelled / error.

schema.name: std-multi-party-flow
schema.description: std-multi-party-flow — Escrow.com / DocuSign / Stripe Connect style multi-party transaction. Header + summary (subject/amount/reference) + named parties (avatar/role/actor) + stage progress + your-turn panel + activity feed + dispute/cancel escape hatches. Topology = loading / awaiting / capturing_dispute / capturing_cancel / funded / released / disputed / cancelled / error.

fields.name: parties
fields.description: A list of participants involved in the transaction.

fields.name: currentPartyIndex
fields.description: The numerical position of the current party in the list.

fields.name: totalParties
fields.description: The total number of participants involved in the process.

fields.name: currentPartyId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the currently active party.
fields.synonyms: party identifier, party key, party reference

fields.name: currentPartyTitle
fields.description: The descriptive name of the current party involved.
fields.synonyms: party name, party label, party identifier

fields.name: currentPartyActor
fields.description: The identifier of the currently active participant.

fields.name: currentPartyIcon
fields.description: Icon representing the current party in the multi-party flow.

fields.name: currentActionLabel
fields.description: The text displayed for the current action being performed.

fields.name: currentActionIcon
fields.description: Icon representing the current action being performed.

fields.name: currentActionDescription
fields.description: A brief explanation of the action being performed.

fields.name: currentStepLabel
fields.description: The text displayed for the current stage of the process.

fields.name: audit
fields.description: Records of changes and events related to the view.

fields.name: reason
fields.description: The justification or explanation for an action or event.

fields.name: disputeReason
fields.description: The reason provided for initiating a dispute.
fields.synonyms: dispute explanation, dispute justification, reason for dispute

fields.name: cancelReason
fields.description: The reason provided for cancelling the transaction.
fields.synonyms: cancellation reason, cancel explanation, rejection reason

fields.name: errorMessage
fields.description: A textual description of an error condition.

emits.description: Signals a party's acceptance or agreement within the flow.
Signals the dispute process has been initiated.
Indicates a transaction cancellation request has been initiated.
Signals a cancellation request has been submitted.
emits.synonyms: request cancel, initiate cancellation, submit termination

emits.description: Indicates a reason was provided for transaction cancellation.
Transaction funds are distributed to the intended recipients.
Initiates a reset of the current transaction flow.
Signals successful loading of the transaction flow data.
Indicates that loading the flow data failed.

events.name: Flow loaded
events.description: Signals successful loading of the transaction flow data.

events.name: Flow load failed
events.description: Indicates that loading the flow data failed.

events.name: Flow saved
events.description: Indicates the flow data has been successfully saved.

events.name: Flow save failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to save the current flow state.

events.name: Party Confirm
events.description: Signals a party's acceptance or agreement within the flow.

events.name: Open Dispute
events.description: Signals the dispute process has been initiated.

events.name: Cancel Transaction
events.description: Indicates a transaction cancellation request has been initiated.

events.name: Cancel Reason
events.description: Indicates a reason was provided for transaction cancellation.

events.name: Submit Cancel
events.description: Signals a cancellation request has been submitted.
events.synonyms: request cancel, initiate cancellation, submit termination

events.name: Release
events.description: Transaction funds are distributed to the intended recipients.

events.name: Restart
events.description: Initiates a reset of the current transaction flow.

effects.title: Buyer
effects.actionDescription: Authorize $28,500 to be held in escrow until delivery is confirmed.
effects.description: Funds the transaction and confirms receipt of the vehicle.

effects.title: Seller
effects.description: Ships the vehicle and uploads delivery proof.
effects.actionDescription: Mark the vehicle as shipped. Funds will release after the buyer confirms receipt.

effects.title: All parties confirmed
description: is now funded and ready for release.

children.content: Funds are held in escrow and ready for release to the seller.
Describe the issue so all parties and the escrow officer can review. Funds will remain in escrow until the dispute is resolved.
Tell the other parties why this transaction is being cancelled. Any escrowed funds will be returned to the buyer.

effects.title: Dispute opened
effects.description: @entity.disputeReason

children.content: An escrow officer will contact all parties within one business day. Funds remain held until resolution.

effects.title: Transaction cancelled
effects.description: @entity.cancelReason

children.content: Any escrowed funds have been returned to the buyer.

effects.title: Funds released
description: released to the seller. Transaction complete.

children.content: Funds have been released to the seller.
Describe the issue so all parties and the escrow officer can review. Funds will remain in escrow until the dispute is resolved.

parties.label: Parties
parties.description: Ordered participants with role, actor name, and required action

reasonFields.label: Reason fields
reasonFields.description: Form fields shown when capturing a dispute or cancel reason

releaseLabel.description: Label on the final-release primary button

title.label: Page title
title.description: Heading shown above the transaction view

releaseIcon.label: Release icon
releaseIcon.description: Icon next to the release button

transactionReference.label: Reference
transactionReference.description: External identifier shown in the summary

transactionSubject.label: Subject
transactionSubject.description: Short description of what is being transacted

cancelIcon.label: Cancel icon
cancelIcon.description: Icon next to the cancel button

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for cards rendered by this atom.

disputeIcon.label: Dispute icon
disputeIcon.description: Icon next to the dispute button

disputeLabel.description: Label on the open-dispute escape-hatch button
